Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Agreed occurrences that are preceded by SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed is followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Ratio of SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Reviewer Declined in the entire event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Agreed activities occurring after at least one Reviewer Invitation Reminder (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Percentage of cases where multiple SW-Reviewer Agreed events occur before reaching SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Agreed out of all activities in the “reviewer assignment and response” phase of the process
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Agreed activities that occur without any prior SW-Reviewer Declined or SW-Reviewer Unavailable in the same case
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Agreed out of all reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"
